title: OpenStack (orchestrator)
description: Orchestrates the per-component OpenStack blueprints into one ordered, readiness-gated install. Create one Composition of this Kind per OpenStack installation (one per namespace).

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: identity = MariaDB+Memcached+Keystone+Glance+Horizon; full = also RabbitMQ+Placement+OVS+libvirt+Neutron+Nova (compute, needs an amd64 cluster with the OVS kernel module).

enabled.title: Explicit component selection
enabled.description: Deploy exactly these components plus their transitive dependencies, overriding profile. E.g. ["heat"] also brings up keystone, rabbitmq, mariadb and memcached. Empty uses profile.

installDefinitions.title: Register component CompositionDefinitions
installDefinitions.description: Also register each component blueprint's CompositionDefinition as the first step.

ociRepo.title: OCI chart repository
ociRepo.description: Registry path holding the per-component blueprint charts (openstack-<component>).

componentValues.title: Per-component spec overrides
componentValues.description: Per-component Composition spec overrides, STRICTLY TYPED against each component's chart schema (regenerated per release by hack/gen-componentvalues-schema.py). The value at componentValues.<name> becomes that component's Composition spec; components without an entry use chart defaults.

mariadb.description: Overrides for the mariadb Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

memcached.description: Overrides for the memcached Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

keystone.description: Overrides for the keystone Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

glance.description: Overrides for the glance Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

horizon.description: Overrides for the horizon Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

type.title: Service type
type.description: How to expose Horizon. NodePort (default; uses the NodePort below), LoadBalancer (external L4 LB + public IP on GKE/EKS/AKS), or ClusterIP (in-cluster only).

annotations.title: Service annotations
annotations.description: Annotations for the Service, e.g. cloud LB controls (internal LB, static IP, ...).

rabbitmq.description: Overrides for the rabbitmq Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

openvswitch.description: Overrides for the openvswitch Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

placement.description: Overrides for the placement Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

libvirt.description: Overrides for the libvirt Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

neutron.description: Overrides for the neutron Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

tunnel.title: Tunnel interface
tunnel.description: Host NIC used as the VXLAN tunnel endpoint (e.g. ens4 on GKE/GCE).

nova.description: Overrides for the nova Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

ironic.description: Overrides for the ironic Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

conductor.title: Conductor node selector
conductor.description: The conductor uses hostNetwork for PXE/TFTP/HTTP-boot and must land on a node attached to the provisioning network.

device.title: Provisioning NIC
device.description: Host interface name inside the conductor pod used for PXE/TFTP (PROVISIONER_INTERFACE).

cinder.description: Overrides for the cinder Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

heat.description: Overrides for the heat Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

barbican.description: Overrides for the barbican Composition (chart 0.2.0), deep-merged into its spec.

version.description: Contract version this stanza conforms to.

name.description: DNS-1123 service identifier, used as prefix for rendered resources.

owner.description: Team or contact owning this service adapter.

identity.description: Identity federation wiring: Keycloak client, optional IdP broker, and the groups mapper.

realmRef.description: Name of the KeycloakRealm CR of the owning Org. Defaults to the Org realm when omitted.

groupsMapper.description: Protocol mapper exposing group membership in tokens issued to this client.

idpBroker.description: Optional identity-provider broker this service's logins are federated through.

roleMapping.description: Mandatory map from CMP roles/capabilities to the service's native roles, reconciled by the service adapter into the native system. No service onboards without declaring it.

cmpRole.description: CMP role or capability name (see capabilities[].name / aggregateTo).

nativeRole.description: Role name in the service's native authorization system.

scope.description: Optional native scope the role binds at (e.g. project, organization, folder).

capabilities.description: Atomic, human-readable permissions this service contributes to the capability catalog. Each capability renders one aggregation-labeled ClusterRole; ABAC capabilities additionally render a Kyverno ClusterPolicy.

urlTemplate.description: Context deep-link into the service's native console. Placeholders: {org}, {tenant}, {namespace}, {project}.

preRedirect.description: Optional step executed before redirecting (e.g. native token rescoping).

mode.description: oidc-backchannel is the default; saml-slo only for SAML-only consoles.

sessionMaxTtl.description: Session TTL to keep aligned with the CMP session and downstream tokens.

usage.description: UsageRecord emission declaration. Every record implicitly carries org/tenant/service/resource dimensions plus resource tags; metrics declared here define the service-specific shape consumed uniformly by dashboards and rating.

dimensions.description: Extra per-metric dimensions beyond the implicit org/tenant/service/resource/tags.

health.description: Normalized health emission. The adapter must map the native signal onto exactly: OK | Warning | Critical | Unknown.

type.description: endpoint: probe an HTTPS endpoint; metric: derive from emitted usage metrics; adapter: the adapter computes it natively.

tagging.description: Tag support declaration. Non-tag-native services are tracked in the shared tag registry; remediation declares whether the adapter can patch tags on existing resources.

native.description: Whether the underlying service supports tags/labels natively.

remediation.description: Whether the adapter can patch tags on existing resources (used by governance remediation).

keyPattern.description: Optional regex constraining tag keys accepted by the native system.

ticketing.description: Support-ticket classification and routing hints for tickets opened in the context of this service.

serviceContract.description: Service integration descriptor (contract v1): identity federation, role mapping, capabilities, SSO deep-link, usage/health, tagging, ticketing. Chart defaults are authoritative; deployments override only environment-specific fields (URLs, realm).

contractEmitter.title: Contract emitter (runtime usage/health emission)
contractEmitter.description: Runtime side of serviceContract.usage/health: CronJobs polling the OpenStack APIs on the declared intervals and writing normalized UsageRecord / health rows to ClickHouse over its HTTP interface. Disabled by default.

org.description: Organization stamped on every emitted record (platform-injected).

authUrl.description: Overrides the secret's OS_AUTH_URL when set.

existingSecret.description: Optional secret with keys: username, password.

resources.description: Kubernetes resource requests/limits for the emitter container.

title.description: Human-readable permission shown in the role composer.

enforcement.description: Enforcement layer: rbac = Kubernetes RBAC only; acr = auth-strength/step-up on top of RBAC; cross-org = central parent-realm role; abac = attribute/conditional rule (Kyverno CEL) on top of RBAC.

requiresAcr.description: ACR/LoA the caller's token must satisfy (step-up is triggered otherwise). Required when enforcement is 'acr'.

crossOrgRole.description: Central parent-realm role backing this capability. Required when enforcement is 'cross-org'.

aggregateTo.description: Predefined roles this capability aggregates into (rendered as rbac.krateo.io/aggregate-to-<role> labels).

abac.description: Attribute/conditional rule rendered as a Kyverno ClusterPolicy (CEL). Required when enforcement is 'abac'.
